assertions.title: Click detection marker opens label popover

steps.expected: Chart tab loads with detection markers visible
steps.observed: Chart tab loaded with 509 markers visible across 2 configs
localStorage.clear() executed successfully
Popover appeared with 'Label Detection' title and 3 options

steps.action: Click outside the popover on controls panel
steps.observed: Popover closed (element removed from DOM)

steps.action: Click another marker at different location
steps.expected: Only one popover open at a time
steps.observed: Only one popover element in DOM at any time

steps.expected: Three options: CORRECT green/checkmark, NOISE red/X, BORDERLINE amber/?
steps.observed: 3 buttons: CORRECT (icon ✓, color rgb(38,166,154) green), NOISE (icon ✗, color rgb(239,83,80) red), BORDERLINE (icon ?, color rgb(247,197,72) amber)

assertions.title: Selecting label closes popover and updates marker visual

steps.expected: Popover closes and marker visual updates
steps.observed: Popover removed from DOM, ring primitive updated with 2 rings (one per config marker at same time)
Ring count changed from 0 to 2, green ring color confirmed via _gtRingPrimitive._rawRings
Ring color rgba(38,166,154,0.85) — green
Ring color rgba(239,83,80,0.85) — red
Ring color rgba(247,197,72,0.85) — amber

steps.action: Verify unlabeled markers have no ring
steps.observed: Only 6 rings for 3 labeled markers (2 each, one per config), 509 total markers — unlabeled have no rings
Key 'gt_labels_eval_comparison_2config' contains 3 label records

steps.expected: Record has detection_id, primitive, timeframe, label, labelled_date
steps.observed: Sample record: {detection_id: 'displacement_5m_2024-01-08T23:55:00_bear', primitive: 'displacement', timeframe: '5m', label: 'CORRECT', labelled_date: '2026-03-09T06:46:57.088Z'} — all required fields present

evidence.localStorage: gt_labels_eval_comparison_2config key verified with correct schema

assertions.title: Labels load from localStorage on page refresh

steps.expected: Labels loaded from localStorage, colored rings displayed
steps.observed: After reload: _gtLabels has 3 entries, 6 rings rendered with correct colors (red, amber, green)

assertions.title: Previously labeled markers show correct labels on reload

steps.observed: 3 labels saved to localStorage
After reload: 6 rings total (2 per label), colors match: 2 green (CORRECT→later changed to NOISE), 2 red (NOISE), 2 amber (BORDERLINE)
Popover opened with CORRECT button having 'gt-popover-btn-active' class (isActive: true), other two inactive
Label changed to NOISE, ring count: 4 red, 2 amber, 0 green (previously was 2 green, 2 red, 2 amber)
After reload, label for detection_id 'displacement_5m_2024-01-08T23:55:00_bear' is 'NOISE'

assertions.title: Labels scoped per primitive and per timeframe

steps.action: Inspect detection_id format for all labels
steps.expected: detection_id includes primitive and TF info
steps.observed: All detection IDs follow format '{primitive}_{tf}_{timestamp}_{direction}', e.g., 'displacement_5m_2024-01-08T23:55:00_bear'

steps.action: Verify primitive and timeframe fields in label records
steps.expected: Each record has explicit primitive and timeframe fields
steps.observed: All 3 records have primitive='displacement' and timeframe='5m', detIdIncludesPrimitive=true, detIdIncludesTF=true

evidence.jsonInspection: All detection_ids contain primitive name and timeframe as components

steps.action: Click marker near right edge of chart (screenX=963, screenY=462)
steps.observed: Popover rect: left=873, top=297, right=1053, bottom=450. Viewport: 1280x720. All bounds within viewport (withinBounds=true)

steps.action: Open Lock Panel via Lock button
steps.expected: Lock Panel visible with Export Labels button
steps.observed: Lock Panel opened with 'Export Labels' button visible
Export function executed successfully: generated Blob URL, created download link with filename 'ground_truth_labels.json'

steps.expected: Valid JSON with all label records
steps.observed: Valid JSON array with 3 entries, each containing detection_id, primitive, timeframe, label, labelled_date — all fields present

assertions.title: Ground truth annotation persists across reload

steps.observed: Green ring rendered at marker position via GTRingPrimitive
Screenshot captured showing labeled markers with rings
After reload: 4 labels present (3 original + 1 new CORRECT), 8 rings rendered, green ring confirmed (hasGreenRing=true)

steps.action: Verify label retrievable from persistence layer
steps.observed: localStorage.getItem('gt_labels_eval_comparison_2config') returns valid JSON with all labels

summary: Tested 12 assertions: 12 passed, 0 failed. All ground truth annotation features working correctly — marker click opens popover, three label options with correct colors, labels persist via localStorage, survive page reload, can be changed, detection IDs scope by primitive+TF, popover respects viewport bounds, and export produces valid JSON.
